validations: Dashboard new item form has menu image upload controls and no horizontal scroll.
Dashboard image preview appears after selecting/uploading a local file.
Existing menu item renders current uploaded image preview and editable fields.
Restaurant Premium displays uploaded menu.imageUrl with CTA visible and no broken images.
Menu image change persisted through PUT /api/v1/menus/:id.
Cafe Premium displays changed uploaded menu.imageUrl with CTA visible and no broken images.
Removing imageUrl persists null and Cafe Premium renders fallback visual without broken image.
